channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: Tinashe announces new LP ‘Popstar,’ shares “Crash Out”
item.description: 🌟 Dive into the sound of summer with @Tinashe's upcoming album 'Popstar'! 🎶 #NewMusicAlert #TinashePopstar

item.title: The Killers, Olivia Dean Lead New Ocean Way Festival
item.description: Dive into the summer vibes with The Killers and Olivia Dean at Ocean Way Festival! 🌊🎶 #MusicFestivalFun

item.title: Slipknot Working on New Album with Producer Matt Wallace: “We Have So Much Material”
item.description: 🔥 Slipknot is back in the studio with Matt Wallace! New album in the works and it's gonna be epic! 🎶 #MetalMonday

item.title: Coachella Organizers Announce New Santa Monica Beach Festival
item.description: 🌴🎶 Surf's up! Coachella is hitting the beach with a new festival in Santa Monica! Who's ready for sun, sand, and live music vibes? 🏖️ #MusicNews

item.title: Echo and the Bunnymen Reveal First Album in 12 Years
item.description: Guess who's back! 🎉 Echo and the Bunnymen drop new album after 12 years! 🎶 #MusicNews #EchoAndTheBunnymen
